name: Anchor's built-in constraints
description: Anchor's account validation constraints (has_one, constraint, owner, etc.) that prevent common attack vectors.

name: Sec3 (formerly Soteria)
description: Automated smart contract auditing tool and security platform for Solana programs.

name: OtterSec
description: Leading Solana security auditing firm. Audited Jupiter, Marinade, Drift, and many top protocols.

name: Neodyme
description: Security research firm specializing in Solana. Known for discovering critical vulnerabilities in core programs.

name: Solana Security Workshop
description: Open-source collection of vulnerable Solana programs for learning common exploit patterns.
